name: go-like-hell
description: A. J. Baime's story of Ford vs Ferrari — the rivalry, the engineering, the culture clash, and the drivers who risked everything to win Le Mans.
useCase: Rivalry-driven innovation, bridging organizational cultures, making high-stakes bets, performing under pressure, hiring game-changing talent.
knownRisks: The motorsport context is specific — automotive racing dynamics may not translate to all industries
Some characters and events have been dramatized for narrative effect
1960s corporate culture is not a model for modern leadership in all aspects
